response.justification: Bogdan brings extensive software engineering experience, well exceeding the 15-year requirement, with a clear focus on technical craftsmanship, cloud infrastructure, and a strong history of knowledge sharing and open-source contributions. While deep AI expertise isn't the primary focus across his entire career, his current role at Stripe is highly relevant to AI-agent infrastructure, and his entrepreneurial spirit combined with his technical breadth makes him a strong candidate for a Principal Engineer role focused on strategy and innovation.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (15+ years) with a focus on craftsmanship.
Strong background in cloud and infrastructure engineering (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, microservices).
Demonstrated ability to inspire and share knowledge through workshops, talks, and open-source projects.
concerns: AI expertise, while current, is not consistently demonstrated as a primary career focus.
Limited explicit experience advising strategic customers/partners on cutting-edge AI technologies.
No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
